# previewItemTitle | Apple Developer Documentation

- [ Quick Look ](/documentation/quicklook)

- [ QLPreviewItem ](/documentation/quicklook/qlpreviewitem)

- [ previewItemTitle ](/documentation/quicklook/qlpreviewitem/previewitemtitle)

- [ QLPreviewItem ](/documentation/quicklook/qlpreviewitem)

-  previewItemTitle 

Instance Property# previewItemTitle

iOS 4.0+iPadOS 4.0+Mac Catalyst 13.0+visionOS 1.0+

```
optional var previewItemTitle: String? { get }
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/quicklook/qlpreviewitem/previewitemtitle#discussion)

The item’s title this will be used as apparent item title.

The title replaces the default item display name. This property is optional.
